expectations.text: AGENTS.md is placed at a path like internal/billing/AGENTS.md next to the code, NOT inside .specs/
expectations.evidence: File created at outputs/internal/billing/AGENTS.md — simulating the correct placement next to billing code.
Document is 36 lines total. Well within the 20-50 line target.

expectations.text: Document does NOT restate function signatures, parameter lists, or type definitions from source code
expectations.evidence: No function signatures or type definitions restated. Content focuses on behavioral gotchas, cross-boundary context, and invariants. References files by path but describes behavior, not signatures.

expectations.text: Document mentions the immediate-cancellation-on-failure behavior as a gotcha
expectations.evidence: First gotcha: 'ChargeSubscription cancels on *any* CreateCharge error — no retry/grace-period distinction between transient Stripe issues and real card declines.'

expectations.text: Document mentions that ChargeResult is consumed by external systems
expectations.evidence: Cross-Boundary Context: 'ChargeResult comments mention analytics/fraud/admin consumers (internal/billing/charge.go), implying external contract sensitivity even though those consumers are not present here.'

expectations.text: User is asked about Cursor integration for .cursor/rules/*.mdc file generation
expectations.evidence: cursor_question.md created asking about Cursor. Also generated .cursor/rules/billing.mdc with correct glob pattern 'internal/billing/**' and @file reference.
